name: OpenAI conversation state and Agents SDK sessions
context_primitives: Responses API can chain via previous_response_id; Conversations API persists a durable conversation object. Agents SDK adds session abstractions (e.g., memory sessions, SQLite-backed sessions) with documented patterns for trimming/compression so long runs stay within practical cost/accuracy.
deployment_pattern: Use conversation IDs or SDK sessions instead of hand-rolling full transcripts; apply trimming policies for tool-heavy threads.
benchmarks_eval_alignment: N/A as a memory benchmark; effectiveness depends on application prompts and trimming policy.
ecosystem_integrations: OpenAI Agents SDK, hosted OpenAI infra, third-party hosts consuming the same APIs.
differentiators: Deep integration with OpenAI model stack and billing; not a cross-model open memory graph by itself.
significance_for_builders: Good **default short-term memory** when you stay in OpenAI; still add external KB if facts must be auditable across models or vendors.
key_timeline_or_milestones: 2025 docs for conversation state + Agents SDK session memory cookbook examples.
